name: ExtensionResearchSubject_Consent
title: R5: consent
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `ResearchSubject.consent` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`ResearchSubject.consent` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Consent)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `ResearchSubject.consent` 0..* `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Consent)`
*  R4B: `ResearchSubject.consent` 0..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Consent)`
*  R4: `ResearchSubject.consent` 0..1 `Reference(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Consent)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `ResearchSubject.consent` allows multiple values in the source, but is mapped to an element that does not allow multiple values in the target.
Element `ResearchSubject.consent` is mapped to FHIR R4 element `ResearchSubject.consent` as `SourceIsBroaderThanTarget`.

element.definition: A record of the patient's informed agreement to participate in the study.
